headline: Autodesk (ADSK) Could Be 33% Undervalued Following Its Cloud Subscription Narrative
summary: Interest in Autodesk (ADSK) has picked up again after renewed focus on how a decade-long investment in the stock might look today, highlighting its cloud-based subscription model and recurring revenue profile. See our latest analysis for Autodesk. At around $212.22, Autodesk’s recent 1 month share price return of 6.95% contrasts with a year to date share price decline of 25.99% and a 1 year total shareholder return that is down 27.95%. This suggests recent momentum is improving after a...
